proposal_summary: A proposal to update Reserve Factors and IR curves for frozen assets on Aave V2 Ethereum to encourage repayment and deprecation.

disclosed_entities.name: AaveV2Ethereum
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: A proposal to update Reserve Factors and IR curves for frozen assets on V2 Ethereum

claimed_actions.raw_action: update Reserve Factors and IR curves for frozen assets
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: encourage the repayment of borrowed assets and redemption of supplied assets by setting RF to 99.90% and Base Rate to 20%, Slope1 to 0%, Slope2 to 300%
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: setting the RFs of all frozen assets on V2 Ethereum to near 100% ... raising the borrow rates across V2 frozen assets ... Set Base Rate at 20% / Set Slope1 at 0% / Set Slope2 at 300%

claimed_complexity.reason: Updates RF and IR curves across 20 distinct assets on V2 Ethereum, involving multiple parameter updates per asset.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Specification table shows RF, Base, Slope1, and Slope2 changes for 20 assets.

limitations: No deployed addresses for the payload or targeted smart contracts were explicitly provided in the text (only GitHub links).
